commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `gateway.tls.extraCaCerts` to gateway config/schema/docs and injects the trimmed configured path into `NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS` during managed gateway service install-plan generation.

PR surface: Source +16, Tests +29, Docs +2. Total +47 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: no. live high-confidence reproduction was run in this read-only review. Source inspection supports the linked issue: current main has no config-owned extra CA field, while generated service environments only consume existing env/default TLS startup values.
